title: Cherry Blossom Tree House Micro Building Blocks Set,Peach Blossom Pond Flowers Bricks Architecture Kit with LED Light Gifts for Adults and Kids（2500+Pieces）
features: Small particle assembly to create a dreamy fairyland：The Fairy Pavilion building block set adopts an exquisite small particle design, making each block carefully carved and tightly pieced together to create a stable and delicate model. The set includes elements such as waterfalls, peach trees, and courtyards. Through clever assembly and combination, it perfectly presents a light purple fairyland full of fantasy colors

Three variable lighting groups create a versatile atmosphere：This building block set is equipped with three variable lighting groups, and with simple operations, you can easily switch between different lighting modes. Whether it's warm light, dreamy colored light, or soft white light, they can create a different atmosphere for the building block model, making you feel like you are in a constantly changing fairyland

Micro Particle Building Block Challenge：This product adopts a micro particle building block design, with smaller particle sizes than regular building blocks, which increases the difficulty of splicing. It is very suitable for players who enjoy challenges and seek excitement. During the splicing process, you can not only exercise patience and attention, but also gain a full sense of achievement after completion

Detailed assembly manual, easy to get started：In order to allow players to better enjoy the fun of assembly, the Fairy Pavilion Building Block Set also comes with a detailed assembly manual. This manual provides a detailed explanation of the assembly method and precautions for each step in a visual and textual manner, making it easy for even first-time players to get started with building blocks

Multi scenario applicability, making fairyland ubiquitous：This building block set is not only suitable for display at home, but can also be used as office decoration, holiday gifts, or party props for various purposes. Whether you want to create a dreamy workspace for yourself or give your friends a special gift, it can meet your needs and allow you to experience the charm of fairyland in multiple scenarios
